//: Config for the /feature-map skill. Paths are RELATIVE to the wiki repo root (this file's repo) so they travel across machines/clones. To reuse on another project: copy the .claude/ folder, then edit this file. Fields marked (derived) are populated by running the skill on a fresh project.
_topology_note: monolith | microservices. monolith â‡’ fileâ†’capability tags only (compiler+tests are the propagation net). microservices â‡’ also a service partition + cross-service contracts.
_capabilitySource_note: subsystem-pages = the wiki is already code-shaped, reuse subsystem slugs as capability tags (Hark). graph-tags = derive a controlled vocab from the graph's per-file tags (curate via query-graph.mjs node-tags).
_featureSources_note: Authoritative sources of user-facing features + their status (status docs, user stories, roadmap, README). The feature-mapper agent reads these.
_services_note: (micro only, derived) graph layers grouped into deployable/process units. Polyglot services (different language â‡’ no shared compiler) are where cross-service contracts matter most.

contracts.name: WS wire protocol
contracts.note: snake_case JSON mirrored by hand in TS; no shared compiler across the Swiftâ†”TS seam

_contracts_note: (micro only, derived) the un-greppable cross-service edges: wire protocols, API/event schemas, IPC bridges, deploy/compose manifests. Source these from the contract files, NOT the code graph.
